title: "Wuthering Heights"
tmdbOverview: Tragedy strikes when Heathcliff falls in love with Catherine Earnshaw, a woman from a wealthy family in 18th-century England.
synopsis: Released in 2026, "Wuthering Heights" is a romance and drama film from United Kingdom and United States. It carries a 6.2 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
